name: A New World
description:
"Our own Apollo mission."

[exploring unfamiliar worlds]

.

The desire for exploration is not something to be ignored. If adventure calls, you must answer or else you'll never leave. Recruited but with eagerness, Apollo (No. 24 of the Apollo Series) became one of the many followers of such a life. To live one of adventure, exploring worlds outside of their own understanding, for the sake of making them understandable. It doesn't matter if he's stuck exploring safe and habitable planets, it's just enough for him.

[Avatar Source: Djayjesse]

Summary:

Apollo is an organic being, the protogen-like parts are just armor or accessories to aid in his explorations. Naturally, Apollo has an affinity to explore the unknown. Being a part of the Apollo Series on Shadaska (his home planet), he specializes in examining plant life on foreign worlds. He's friendly enough to accept company, and is quite optimistic, the will to discover being the only fuel he needs.
creator: shokokokok
